channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: News Corp Australia Blocks Crawler Bots with Access Issues Message
item.description: The article discusses an automated message sent to users attempting to access News Corp Australia websites, indicating they may have been detected as a crawler bot. The message explains that News Corp...

item.title: EFF demands apology from Mbalula over defamatory remarks and threatens legal action
item.description: The Economic Freedom Fighters (EFF) has issued a formal demand to ANC secretary-general Fikile Mbalula, requiring him to retract defamatory remarks made during an ANC media briefing. The party's lawye...

item.title: Private schools encouraged to diversify income and strengthen financial sustainability
item.description: Private school owners in Tanzania have been encouraged to reduce their dependence on tuition fees by developing additional income streams and exploring wider financing opportunities to improve long-te...

item.title: Green Man Festival marks a decade of helping refugees and asylum seekers gain skills and confidence through training placements
item.description: The Green Man Festival in Wales is celebrating the tenth anniversary of its refugee training programme, an initiative run by the Green Man Trust that has supported 191 refugees and asylum seekers as t...

item.title: Tanzania's DITF Drives Trade and Creates 600,000 Jobs Over 50 Years
item.description: The Dar es Salaam International Trade Fair (DITF), also known as Sabasaba, has become a cornerstone of Tanzania's economic diplomacy over its 50-year history. Since its inception, the exhibition has g...

item.title: Masked assailant damages Israeli TV channel during escalating tensions
item.description: A masked assailant attacked the Israeli TV channel's premises, shattering glass and smashing doors, amid rising tensions in the region. The incident occurred as tensions between Israel and its neighbo...

item.title: Pakistan to Mediate US-Iran Technical Talks on July 14-15
item.description: Pakistan is set to host a fresh round of US-Iran technical talks from July 14-15, according to government sources. The discussions will focus on US sanctions on Iran, frozen assets, and the Iranian nu...

item.title: Opinion column argues Mark Carney has fallen short on economic performance and leadership promises
item.description: This opinion column by Marty York argues that Prime Minister Mark Carney has failed to deliver on both economic management and leadership. The author begins by claiming that Carney has not done enough...

item.title: President William Ruto's Motorcade Involved in Accident on Embu-Meru Highway
item.description: President William Ruto's motorcade was involved in a road accident on the Embu-Meru Highway while heading to a church service in Gatunduri, Manyatta Constituency. The crash, which occurred on Sunday, ...

item.title: Experts Recommend Cleaning Common Household Fabrics Such as Curtains, Dog Beds, and Bath Mats More Frequently
item.description: The article examines a commonly overlooked aspect of household cleaning: the frequency with which many fabric items around the home should be washed. While most people regularly clean clothing, bed sh...

item.title: Indian government responds to Supreme Court order on Citizenship Amendment Act
item.description: The Indian government has announced its response to the Supreme Court's order regarding the Citizenship Amendment Act (CAA), which grants citizenship to persecuted religious minorities from neighborin...

item.title: Sara Duterte impeachment trial begins as Senate hears charges that could determine her political future
item.description: The impeachment trial of Philippine Vice President Sara Duterte is scheduled to begin on July 6, marking one of the most significant political events in the country in recent years. Senate proceedings...

item.title: Texas Gov. Greg Abbott's Appointment of Don Huffines as Comptroller Draws Criticism Over Epstein Ranch Connections
item.description: Texas Governor Greg Abbott appointed Republican businessman and former state senator Don Huffines to serve as Texas comptroller, a move that has generated political criticism because Huffines is alrea...

item.title: Trump's Attempts to Troll Taylor Swift During Her Wedding Are Met with Calm Response
item.description: The article details how Donald Trump's administration attempted to mock Taylor Swift's wedding to Travis Kelce on July 4, 2026, through social media parodies. The White House posted memes altering Mad...

item.title: Jeffrey Santos Accepts Banker's Offer in 'Kapamilya Deal or No Deal'
item.description: Jeffrey Santos, a contestant in the Philippine game show 'Kapamilya Deal or No Deal', secured a prize of 477,000 pesos after accepting a banker's offer during the episode. The show, hosted by Luis Man...

item.title: Carney's Support for Reforms Contrasted with Hamas's Arming Activities
item.description: The article critiques the perceived hypocrisy of political figures like Carney, who advocate for reforms in the Palestinian Authority while Hamas continues to arm itself and engage in violent activiti...

item.title: Inquest into baby's death following forceps-related skull injury
item.description: A coroner's inquest has heard that a newborn baby died following a forceps-assisted delivery where the obstetrician's actions resulted in a fractured skull. The tragic incident, which occurred in Vict...

item.title: Interior Secretary Doug Burgum confronts CNN host over Lincoln Memorial pool incident
item.description: U.S. Interior Secretary Doug Burgum faced intense scrutiny from CNN anchor Dana Bash regarding the failed $14 million effort to transform the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool into 'American flag blue....

item.title: Toronto Developer Abandons High-Rise Project Near Sneaky Dee’s, Avoiding Demolition
item.description: A developer in Toronto has unexpectedly halted a proposed high-rise condominium project that would have required the demolition of the iconic Sneaky Dee’s restaurant. The decision comes after communit...

item.title: Somali Migrants Choose to Stay in South Africa Despite Anti-Immigrant Protests
item.description: The article discusses the decision of Somali migrants to remain in South Africa despite escalating anti-immigrant protests and xenophobic violence. Despite the risks, many Somali migrants prefer to st...
